LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 22, 2014 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN APRIL 15, 2014 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT ; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT CONSTRUES PLAINTIFF'S MOTION AS SEEKING RELIEF UNDER CCP 473. PLAINTIFF FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE GROUNDS FOR RELIEF. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR# 5976.

calendar.matters:
MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Bradley A. Russi, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.3964, for defendants and opposing party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is denied without prejudice. The Court construes plaintiff's motion as seeking relief under CCP 473. Plaintiff fails to demonstrate grounds for relief. Order signed. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Continued To Apr-22-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - SEGLENDA CRIGLER, TEL. NO. 545-3855, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SEGLENDA CRIGLER's MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to April 22, 2014 to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than April 15, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the opposition papers. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert ; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =302/ehg
